title: Imperva - Malicious user agent
description: 'Detects requests containing known malicious user agent strings.'
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs') and (('User Agent' like '*Nikto*' or 'User Agent' like '*hydra*' or 'User Agent' like '*advanced email extractor*' or 'User Agent' like '*BFAC*' or 'User Agent' like '*brutus*' or 'User Agent' like '*cgichk*' or 'User Agent' like '*cisco-torch*' or 'User Agent' like '*scanner*' or 'User Agent' like '*datacha0s*' or 'User Agent' like '*dirbuster*' or 'User Agent' like '*grabber*' or 'User Agent' like '*havij*' or 'User Agent' like '*internet ninja*' or 'User Agent' like '*masscan*' or 'User Agent' like '*morfeus*' or 'User Agent' like '*mysqloit*' or 'User Agent' like '*n-stealth*' or 'User Agent' like '*nessus*' or 'User Agent' like '*netsparker*' or 'User Agent' like '*nmap nse*' or 'User Agent' like '*nmap scripting engine*' or 'User Agent' like '*nmap-nse*' or 'User Agent' like '*nsauditor*' or 'User Agent' like '*openvas*' or 'User Agent' like '*pangolin*' or 'User Agent' like '*qualys was*' or 'User Agent' like '*security scan*' or 'User Agent' like '*springenwerk*' or 'User Agent' like '*sql power injector*' or 'User Agent' like '*sqlmap*' or 'User Agent' like '*sqlninja*' or 'User Agent' like '*w3af.sf.net*' or 'User Agent' like '*w3af.sourceforge.net*' or 'User Agent' like '*w3af.org*' or 'User Agent' like '*webbandit*' or 'User Agent' like '*webinspect*' or 'User Agent' like '*webvulnscan*' or 'User Agent' like '*xmlrpc exploit*' or 'User Agent' like '*WPScan*' or 'User Agent' like '*XSpider*' or 'User Agent' like '*Webster*' or 'User Agent' like '*fantomCrew*' or 'User Agent' like '*fantomBrowser*')) | timestats span = 5minute count as count_ by 'Source IP'

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize the Microsoft Sentinel converted detection results and identify the highest-risk pivots.
